commands.purpose: Print catalog stats: row counts per entity, latest vendor-package version, locale coverage for country translations, MaxMind DB age. --entity=Country --code=FR prints the resolved row.
Convenience wrapper for `php artisan world:install`. Ensures the six tables are seeded. --force truncates + re-seeds (destructive).
Dispatch RefreshMaxMindDatabaseJob synchronously. --force bypasses the freshness check + always re-downloads.
Resolve one IP + print the localized GeolocationData. Useful for debugging MaxMind vs ip-api.com discrepancies.
Populate top-N cache entries per locale. Dispatched by scheduler.
Compare our DB against the vendor seeder. --fix applies missing rows (never overwrites platform-admin overrides). --dry-run reports.
